import "github.com/retr0h/osapi/internal/provider"

<a name="WireProviderFacts"></a>

## func [WireProviderFacts](https://github.com/osapi-io/osapi/blob/main/internal/provider/facts.go#L64-L67)

```go
func WireProviderFacts(factsFn FactsFunc, providers ...any)
```

WireProviderFacts sets the facts function on all providers that support it.
Providers that embed FactsAware automatically satisfy FactsSetter.

<a name="FactsAware"></a>

## type [FactsAware](https://github.com/osapi-io/osapi/blob/main/internal/provider/facts.go#L41-L43)

FactsAware provides facts access to providers via embedding. Embed this in any
provider struct to gain access to agent facts:

```
type MyProvider struct {
    provider.FactsAware
    // ... other fields
}
```

```go
type FactsAware struct {
    // contains filtered or unexported fields
}
```

<a name="FactsAware.Facts"></a>

### func \(\*FactsAware\) [Facts](https://github.com/osapi-io/osapi/blob/main/internal/provider/facts.go#L54)

```go
func (f *FactsAware) Facts() map[string]any
```

Facts returns the current agent facts, or nil if not available.

<a name="FactsAware.SetFactsFunc"></a>

### func \(\*FactsAware\) [SetFactsFunc](https://github.com/osapi-io/osapi/blob/main/internal/provider/facts.go#L47-L49)

```go
func (f *FactsAware) SetFactsFunc(fn FactsFunc)
```

SetFactsFunc sets the facts getter. Called after agent initialization to wire
the provider to the agent's live facts.

<a name="FactsFunc"></a>

## type [FactsFunc](https://github.com/osapi-io/osapi/blob/main/internal/provider/facts.go#L26)

FactsFunc returns the current agent facts for use by providers. Called at
execution time so providers always get the latest facts.

```go
type FactsFunc func() map[string]any
```

<a name="FactsSetter"></a>

## type [FactsSetter](https://github.com/osapi-io/osapi/blob/main/internal/provider/facts.go#L30-L32)

FactsSetter is satisfied by any provider that embeds FactsAware. Used at wiring
time to inject the facts function into all providers.

```go
type FactsSetter interface {
    SetFactsFunc(fn FactsFunc)
}
```
